## Documentation Contract

- [ ] I read `CLAUDE.md`, routed this work through `docs/README.md`, and used the owning plan's declared **Read first** set.
- [ ] I updated the owning plan and every document named by its **Documentation impact** requirement.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_docs.py --check`.
- [ ] I confirmed the documentation contract reports deliberate documentation drift as a failure when applicable.
- [ ] A fresh reader can identify this change's owning plan, current stage, and minimum reading set from `CLAUDE.md` and `docs/README.md`.

## Validation

- [ ] Applicable automated tests, lint, typecheck, and build commands pass.
